variants.title: MicroFit MFHR55459 | Replaces the Mahle PI37025RN
variants.option1Value: MicroFit MFHR55459 | Replaces the Mahle PI37025RN
variants.description: Genuine MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHR55459 filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHR55459 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
specifications: Style: DIN Return Filter, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 60µ, Outer Diameter: 110.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 52.5 mm, Length: 250.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 10 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 60µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Filtrec XR250T60B0 DIN Return Filter | Replaces the Mahle PI37025RN
variants.option1Value: Filtrec XR250T60B0 DIN Return Filter | Replaces the Mahle PI37025RN
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec XR250T60B0. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the XR250T60B0 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
